title: Azure SAS token authentication failure
symptom: When using a custom auth credential with Azure SAS tokens, the request returns a 403 error indicating authentication failure. The query string parameters do not appear to be correctly formatted.
applies_when: Sending Azure SAS token via query string
not_this_if: Query string parameters are manually appended to the URL
root_cause: The Azure UI provides SAS tokens that are already URL-encoded. If these tokens are used directly in the n8n query string without decoding, they become double-encoded, leading to authentication failures when the request is sent.
fix_steps: Decode the SAS token parameters provided by Azure
Update the `qs` JSON in n8n with the decoded values
agent_instruction: Ensure the SAS token parameters are correctly decoded before using them in the n8n HTTP Request node.
